faqs.question: How much does wasp removal cost in Freeport?
faqs.answer: Our wasp removal services in Freeport range from $350 to $550 depending on nest location, size, and accessibility. This includes complete nest removal, treatment of the area to prevent return, and a follow-up inspection to ensure all wasps are eliminated.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in Freeport?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day wasp removal service throughout Freeport and Long Island. Most wasp nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, and we can schedule emergency services for nests in high-traffic areas or near entryways where stings are likely.

faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Freeport?
faqs.answer: Freeport properties commonly deal with yellow jackets, paper wasps, bald-faced hornets, and European hornets. Yellow jackets often nest in ground cavities and wall voids, while paper wasps build their umbrella-shaped nests under eaves, decks, and porch overhangs throughout the village.

faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, our licensed technicians use EPA-approved products and safety protocols designed to protect your family and pets during wasp removal. We establish safety perimeters, use protective equipment, and schedule treatments at optimal times to minimize any risk to residents or animals on your Freeport property.
